headline: Oppenheimer Reiterates Outperform on AppLovin (APP) With $660 Price Target
summary: AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the 10 Top Stocks Fund Managers Are Loading Up On in 2026. On March 27, 2026, Oppenheimer reiterated its Outperform rating on AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP), with a price target of $660. The firm’s analyst, Martin Yang, noted that the brand awareness of AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ:APP)’s AXON remains nascent beyond […]
